title: Hybrid Laminate Flooring
shortDescription: 100% waterproof wooden flooring. Enjoy the luxury look of real wood with the safety of a waterproof core. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and living rooms in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Goals Floors brings you the ultimate solution for wooden flooring: The Cobra Hybrid Series. If you love the warm, rich look of real wooden floors but are worried about water damage, swelling, or scratches, this is exactly what you need.

Our Hybrid Flooring combines the beautiful texture of natural wood with a 100% waterproof core. Whether you are renovating a modern kitchen in Gurugram, a dining area in Delhi, or a ground-floor home in Noida, this flooring easily handles water spills, high humidity, and daily cleaning without any damage. It features an ultra-tough AC-5 top layer, making it highly scratch-resistant and safe for homes with active kids and pets. Enjoy luxury flooring without the stress of maintenance.

features.title: 100% Waterproof Core
features.description: Unlike standard wooden floors, this flooring will not swell, warp, or get damaged by water spills or high humidity.

features.title: Safe for Kitchens & Bathrooms
features.description: Because of its water resistance, you can finally have a luxurious wooden floor look in your kitchen and bathroom dry areas.

features.title: Highly Scratch Resistant (AC-5)
features.description: Built with the highest commercial-grade top layer. It easily resists scratches from moving furniture, high heels, and pet claws.

features.title: Easy Wet-Mop Cleaning
features.description: You don't need to worry about water damage. You can easily clean this floor daily using a normal wet mop (pocha).

features.title: Termite & Borer Proof
features.description: The high-density hybrid core is specially treated, making it completely safe from termites (deemak), which is a big relief for ground-floor homes.

installation: It features a very easy 'Click-Lock' system. The planks simply lock into each other without using any messy glue. The best part is, we can install this directly over your existing flat tiles or marble, saving you the heavy cost and mess of breaking your old floor.
maintenance: It is extremely easy to maintain. Unlike regular wooden flooring, you can safely use a wet mop to clean it daily. Regular sweeping or vacuuming will keep it looking brand new for years.

faqs.question: What is Hybrid Laminate Flooring?
faqs.answer: Hybrid flooring is the latest upgrade in wooden floors. It mixes the beautiful, natural look of standard laminate wood with a special core that is 100% waterproof.

faqs.question: Is it really safe to use in a kitchen or bathroom?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! Because the core is completely waterproof, it will not swell if water spills on it. It is highly recommended for kitchens and bathroom dry areas.

faqs.question: Can I clean it with a wet mop (pocha)?
faqs.answer: Yes. While normal wooden floors get damaged by water, our Hybrid flooring can be easily cleaned with a regular wet mop without any worry.

faqs.question: Will my dog's nails scratch this floor?
faqs.answer: No. Our flooring comes with an AC-5 commercial-grade rating. This means the top layer is ultra-tough and highly resistant to scratches from pet claws and furniture.

faqs.question: Do I need to break my old tiles to install this?
faqs.answer: Not at all. If your old tiles or marble floor is flat and level, we can install the Hybrid flooring directly on top of it using a soft underlay sheet.

faqs.question: What is the price of hybrid flooring in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Our premium Cobra Hybrid series starts at approx ₹279/sqft. For large homes or commercial projects in Gurugram and Delhi, please contact us for special wholesale pricing.

faqs.question: Is this flooring safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, the advanced core is chemically treated during manufacturing, making it highly resistant to termites and borers. It is very safe for ground-floor homes.

faqs.question: Does it feel like cheap plastic when walking on it?
faqs.answer: No. It has a premium 12mm thickness and a textured wood-grain surface. It feels solid, comfortable, and exactly like real natural wood under your feet.

faqs.question: Do you provide installation services in Gurugram and Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors has expert installation teams across Delhi, Gurugram, Noida, and Faridabad to ensure your flooring is fitted perfectly.

faqs.question: How long will this flooring last?
faqs.answer: Because of its waterproof nature and AC-5 scratch resistance, this flooring is built to last for decades in normal residential conditions with very little maintenance.

installationSteps.title: Check the Old Floor
points: Ensure your existing floor (tiles, marble, or cement) is flat.
Sweep and clean the floor properly to remove any small stones or dust.

installationSteps.title: Lay the Underlayment
points: Spread a soft foam underlay sheet over the floor.
This helps in making the floor comfortable and absorbs walking sound.

installationSteps.title: Lock the Planks
points: Start from one corner of the room.
Take the Hybrid planks and simply click and lock them into each other using their special grooves.
No glue or cement is needed.

installationSteps.title: Add Skirting
points: Once the whole floor is laid out, install matching wooden skirting on the walls to cover the edges and give a perfect finish.
